classification: Advanced Synthetic Biology & Material Science Framework
core_objective: Theoretical architecture for a Zero-Failure autonomous biological platform.

structural_matrix.mechanism: Limpet-inspired biological waste carbon sintering into black diamond structures

energetic_metabolism.mechanism: Conversion of 150°C thermal energy/healing waste heat back into cellular ATP energy

defensive_security.mechanism: Benign autonomous virophages engineered to hunt, neutralize, and repurpose foreign pathogens

genomic_shielding.mechanism: Radiation-proof molecular shielding of core DNA sequences

regenerative_pathway.mechanism: Hyper-accelerated cellular blastema formation for rapid tissue and limb replacement
